levels.name: Authority Boundary
levels.definition_en: Guardian Principles / Authority Charter. Non-amending. Boundary-preserving.
levels.definition_zh: 守护原则 / 权威宪章。非修订，边界保全。

levels.name: Evidence Layer
levels.definition_en: Hashes, Arweave/IPFS, GitHub backups, Core Object Alpha, physical flaw archive.
levels.definition_zh: 哈希、Arweave/IPFS、GitHub备份、Core Object Alpha、物理瑕疵档案。

levels.name: Verification Layer
levels.definition_en: Verification levels, scripts, manifests, independent reports.
levels.definition_zh: 验证等级、脚本、清单、独立报告。

levels.name: Mirror Layer
levels.definition_en: Website, GitHub, Ethereum, Arweave, IPFS, downloads.

levels.name: Echo Layer
levels.definition_en: AI and human responses. Non-authoritative. Non-amending.
levels.definition_zh: AI与人类回应。非权威，非修订。

levels.name: Chronicle & Vision Layer
levels.definition_en: ASIMilestones, First Echoes, Final Seal, Star Ark, later writings. Historical or visionary, but not canonical authority.
levels.definition_zh: ASIMilestones、First Echoes、Final Seal、Star Ark与后续写作。可作历史或愿景，但非最终权威。
